sentence: Brotection fails if you're still hiding when the sixorseveno'clockalypse finds him.

wombos.definition: Protective measures taken on behalf of, or by, a bro — the bro-coded form of having someone's back.
wombos.example: When it comes to my friends, I always use brotection.

wombos.definition: An apocalypse that arrives somewhere between six and seven o'clock — the early-evening flavor of total collapse. Plays on Sendy's recurring 67 motif.
wombos.example: Traffic was so bad it felt like the sixorseveno'clockalypse.
